vocab.meaning: vui chơi tự do (không có quy tắc gò bó)
vocab.example: I spent most of my weekends in unstructured play, wandering around the neighborhood with the local kids.
My childhood was defined by hands-on exploration in the garden, where I would dig for worms and study plants.
With the boundless energy of a seven-year-old, I used to play tag until the sun went down.

vocab.meaning: gợi lại niềm hoài cổ/nhớ nhung
vocab.example: Thinking about those summer football matches always evokes nostalgia for a simpler time.

vocab.meaning: kích thích phát triển nhận thức
vocab.example: I loved solving complex puzzles, which my parents encouraged to stimulate cognitive development.

vocab.meaning: cửa ngõ/phương thức để giải tỏa sức sáng tạo
vocab.example: Drawing provided a vital creative outlet for me when I was struggling to express myself with words.

vocab.meaning: giao lưu với bạn bè cùng trang lứa
vocab.example: Traditional folk games were the primary way I would socialize with peers in my village.
Driven by an innate curiosity, I used to take my toys apart just to see how they worked.

vocab.meaning: thắt chặt các mối quan hệ giữa người với người
vocab.example: Participating in team sports helped me strengthen interpersonal bonds and learn the value of cooperation.

vocab.meaning: giết thời gian (một cách thư thả)
vocab.example: We enjoyed whiling away the hours by the riverbank, trying to catch small fish with plastic bottles.
